hero.subtitle: A family-run hotel in Lerici, 150 metres from the sea.

camere.title: Featured rooms
camere.subtitle: Carefully furnished rooms, with views of the gulf or the village.

ristorante.title: The Restaurant
ristorante.description: Ligurian and seafood cuisine, with local produce and the gulf's maritime tradition.

pesto.title: The pesto tasting
pesto.description: A handmade experience: mortar, pestle and authentic Ligurian ingredients, to discover the true recipe for Genoese pesto.

lavoro.title: Work stays — Corporate agreements
lavoro.subtitle: For professionals and companies operating in the Port of La Spezia

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: Where is Hotel del Golfo located?
faq.a1: Hotel del Golfo is located in the centre of Lerici, just 150 metres from the sea, in the heart of the Gulf of Poets in Liguria.
faq.q2: Does the hotel have a restaurant?
faq.a2: Yes, our restaurant serves Ligurian and seafood cuisine made with local produce.
faq.q3: How far is it from the Cinque Terre?
faq.a3: The Cinque Terre are about 20 minutes away by train from Lerici.
faq.q4: Does the hotel offer corporate agreements?
faq.a4: Yes, we offer dedicated rates and agreements for professionals and companies operating in the Port of La Spezia.

CamerePage.title: Our rooms
CamerePage.subtitle: Carefully furnished rooms, with views of the gulf or the village.

CameraDetailPage.notFoundBody: The room you're looking for doesn't exist or is no longer available.

RistorantePage.title: The Restaurant
RistorantePage.fallbackDescription: Ligurian and seafood cuisine, with local produce and the gulf's maritime tradition.

cinqueTerre.descrizione: The famous colourful terraces overlooking the sea, reachable by train or boat.

portovenere.descrizione: A UNESCO World Heritage fishing village, with the church of San Pietro on the rock.

kayak.descrizione: Explore the gulf from the sea, among coves and hidden little beaches.

trekking.descrizione: Scenic routes between Lerici, Tellaro and the Montemarcello Park.

LavoroPage.title: For those who work in the Gulf
LavoroPage.subtitle: Dedicated rates for professionals and companies operating in the Port of La Spezia
serviziDefault: Corporate invoicing and agreements with companies
Restaurant with affordable set menu for workers
LavoroPage.convenzioniFallback: We have been working with companies, cooperatives and businesses in the La Spezia industrial district for over 30 years. Contact us to arrange a tailored agreement.

ContattiPage.title: Contact
ContattiPage.auto: By car: A12 motorway, Sarzana exit, then SP331 to Lerici (15 min).
ContattiPage.treno: By train: La Spezia Centrale station, then bus or taxi (20 min).
ContattiPage.battello: By boat: seasonal connections from La Spezia and Portovenere.

OffertePage.title: Offers
OffertePage.subtitle: Seasonal packages and promotions for your stay in Lerici.
OffertePage.empty: No active offers at the moment.

GalleriaPage.title: Gallery
GalleriaPage.subtitle: Glimpses of the hotel, the rooms, the restaurant and Lerici.

LericiPage.title: Lerici
LericiPage.subtitle: In the heart of the Gulf of Poets, between a castle, fishing villages and coves.
LericiPage.castelloDescrizione: A medieval fortress overlooking the sea, with views of the gulf and a small geopalaeontology museum.
LericiPage.portoDescrizione: The heart of village life, among fishing boats, bars and sunset strolls.
LericiPage.spiaggeDescrizione: Free and equipped beaches and coves, within walking distance of the centre.
LericiPage.tellaroDescrizione: A colourful fishing village, among the most beautiful in Italy.
LericiPage.sanTerenzoDescrizione: A hamlet with a castle and the long beach where Lord Byron once stayed.
LericiPage.fiascherinoDescrizione: A secluded little bay, dear to the Romantic poets.

CookieConsent.title: We use cookies
CookieConsent.description: We use technical cookies necessary for the site to work and, with your consent, statistics cookies (Google Analytics) and functional cookies (Google Maps).
CookieConsent.necessaryDescription: Technical cookies essential for the site to work: session and selected language. Always active.
CookieConsent.analyticsDescription: Google Analytics (GA4) — helps us understand how the site is used, in aggregate form.
CookieConsent.functionalDescription: Google Maps — shows the interactive map on the Contact page.
CookieConsent.mapPlaceholder: Map available after accepting functional cookies.

PrivacyPolicyPage.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicyPage.notice: Placeholder text pending legal review — will be replaced with the final text (Iubenda or legal counsel).
PrivacyPolicyPage.titolareText: Hotel del Golfo, Via Gerini 37, 19032 Lerici (SP), Italy — info@hoteldelgolfo.com — +39 0187 967400.
PrivacyPolicyPage.datiText: We collect data voluntarily provided through the site's forms (contact, table booking, agreement request): name, email, phone and message. We do not collect payment data — room bookings go through an external booking portal.
PrivacyPolicyPage.finalitaText: Data is processed to respond to requests received and manage any bookings or agreements, based on consent or the performance of pre-contractual measures (Art. 6 GDPR).
PrivacyPolicyPage.cookieText: The site uses technical, statistics and functional cookies. For the full list and to manage your preferences, see our
PrivacyPolicyPage.dirittiText: You can exercise your rights of access, rectification, erasure, restriction and objection to processing (Art. 15-22 GDPR) at any time by writing to info@hoteldelgolfo.com.
PrivacyPolicyPage.contattiText: For any privacy-related question, write to info@hoteldelgolfo.com.

CookiePolicyPage.title: Cookie Policy
CookiePolicyPage.notice: Placeholder text pending legal review — will be replaced with the final text (Iubenda or legal counsel).
CookiePolicyPage.introText: This site uses technical, statistics and functional cookies to ensure the site works properly and to improve the browsing experience. You can manage your preferences at any time.
